## 📋 Checklist Before Review
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `develop` (rebased or merged)
- [ ] I have not modified files outside my module without discussion
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] No large binary files (PDFs, images in `src/`)
- [ ] `CLIENT_SIGNUP_DETAILS.txt` or any private files are NOT included
- [ ] Code follows the project's naming conventions
